item.title: Threading the Needle in Heavy Recovery
item.description: A delicate recovery maneuver requires inch-perfect accuracy as operators “thread the needle” through tight and dangerous conditions.

media:content.media:title: Threading the Needle in Heavy Recovery
media:content.media:description: A delicate recovery maneuver requires inch-perfect accuracy as operators “thread the needle” through tight and dangerous conditions.

item.title: Tator Handles a Massive Load
item.description: A major recovery operation pushes equipment and crew to the limit as they take on an extremely heavy load with precision and control.

media:content.media:title: Tator Handles a Massive Load
media:content.media:description: A major recovery operation pushes equipment and crew to the limit as they take on an extremely heavy load with precision and control.

item.title: Sharp Turn Sends Fully-Loaded Trailer Into the Ditch
item.description: A sharp turn leads to a fully loaded trailer sliding off the road into a ditch, requiring urgent recovery to prevent further damage or hazards.

media:content.media:title: Sharp Turn Sends Fully-Loaded Trailer Into the Ditch
media:content.media:description: A sharp turn leads to a fully loaded trailer sliding off the road into a ditch, requiring urgent recovery to prevent further damage or hazards.

item.title: Ballast Regulator Off-Rail
item.description: A ballast regulator goes off-rail, creating a complex recovery situation that demands precision equipment and careful coordination to safely reposition it

media:content.media:title: Ballast Regulator Off-Rail
media:content.media:description: A ballast regulator goes off-rail, creating a complex recovery situation that demands precision equipment and careful coordination to safely reposition it

item.title: Jeep Recovery Operation
item.description: A straightforward Jeep recovery operation focused on getting the vehicle out safely using the right towing and rescue equipment. The process highlights real-world recovery work and field conditions.

media:content.media:title: Jeep Recovery Operation
media:content.media:description: A straightforward Jeep recovery operation focused on getting the vehicle out safely using the right towing and rescue equipment. The process highlights real-world recovery work and field conditions.

item.title: Side Puller & Synthetic Line to the Rescue!
item.description: A side puller and synthetic line are used in a real recovery operation to help move a vehicle safely. The focus is on the equipment, setup, and field recovery process. What would you like to see next?

media:content.media:title: Side Puller & Synthetic Line to the Rescue!
media:content.media:description: A side puller and synthetic line are used in a real recovery operation to help move a vehicle safely. The focus is on the equipment, setup, and field recovery process. What would you like to see next?

item.title: Big Power, Bigger Booms in Heavy Recovery
item.description: A look at heavy recovery work with big power and boom equipment in action. The focus is on the recovery process and the machinery used to handle the job. What would you want to see next?

media:content.media:title: Big Power, Bigger Booms in Heavy Recovery
media:content.media:description: A look at heavy recovery work with big power and boom equipment in action. The focus is on the recovery process and the machinery used to handle the job. What would you want to see next?

item.title: Forklift Rear End Stuck in a Recovery Job
item.description: A forklift ends up rear-end stuck and the recovery process gets underway. The focus is on the equipment used and the real-world steps needed to get it moving again. What would you use first?

media:content.media:title: Forklift Rear End Stuck in a Recovery Job
media:content.media:description: A forklift ends up rear-end stuck and the recovery process gets underway. The focus is on the equipment used and the real-world steps needed to get it moving again. What would you use first?

item.title: A Tow Wife's Unexpected Date Night
item.description: What was supposed to be a normal evening takes an unexpected turn when towing life calls. Sometimes the most memorable date nights happen in the middle of a recovery job.

media:content.media:title: A Tow Wife's Unexpected Date Night
media:content.media:description: What was supposed to be a normal evening takes an unexpected turn when towing life calls. Sometimes the most memorable date nights happen in the middle of a recovery job.

item.title: Heavy Haul GONE WRONG!
item.description: A heavy haul operation doesn't go according to plan, turning a routine transport into a difficult recovery and problem-solving mission. What caused the setback, and how do you get things back on track?

media:content.media:title: Heavy Haul GONE WRONG!
media:content.media:description: A heavy haul operation doesn't go according to plan, turning a routine transport into a difficult recovery and problem-solving mission. What caused the setback, and how do you get things back on track?

item.title: Floating a Fire Truck!
item.description: A massive recovery operation gets underway as crews work to move and recover a fire truck in an unusual situation. When heavy equipment meets a unique challenge, creativity becomes just as important as power.

media:content.media:title: Floating a Fire Truck!
media:content.media:description: A massive recovery operation gets underway as crews work to move and recover a fire truck in an unusual situation. When heavy equipment meets a unique challenge, creativity becomes just as important as power.

item.title: Veteran Employee Does Rollback Recovery Job
item.description: A seasoned recovery operator handles a rollback job with precision and confidence, using experience to safely recover a difficult vehicle situation

media:content.media:title: Veteran Employee Does Rollback Recovery Job
media:content.media:description: A seasoned recovery operator handles a rollback job with precision and confidence, using experience to safely recover a difficult vehicle situation
